title: Evaluate lib-bins gate
goal: Evaluate the lib/bin unit test gate identified by init context and update release/context docs only if evidence supports it.
requiredInputs: Current branch clean except harness state update from previous governance close
permissions: run local cargo tests via scripts/test_ci_suites.py lib-bins
completionConditions: Measure `python3 scripts/test_ci_suites.py lib-bins` locally with recorded elapsed time and result
Decide whether to document lib-bins as a recommended or release-gated validation based on evidence
If docs/context change, validate diff/scope and commit/push
Do not modify CI workflow unless the measured result and risk justify it
verificationCommands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, pathlib
for p in pathlib.Path('.codex-harness').rglob('*.json'):
    json.loads(p.read_text())
PY
notes: Safe local measurement. No provider, network, package install, or credential use. Prefer docs-only decision before CI workflow changes.
